title_en: Detained by settlers, US Democrat Ro Khanna now faces pro-Israel attacks
excerpt_en: Progressive congressman accuses Israeli military of 'lying' after settlers held up his van in the occupied West Bank.
Israel’s military has attacked several places across Gaza.

title_en: Protest on London’s Tower Bridge demands release of Dr Hussam Abu Safia
excerpt_en: Pro-Palestine activists unfurled a giant Palestinian flag and a banner on London's Tower Bridge.

title_en: IDF says it hit weapons site in Gaza, as 6 said killed in Strip, including girl
excerpt_en:

title_en: US Democrat Ro Khanna says he was detained by armed Israeli settlers
excerpt_en: Khanna, 49, was visiting the occupied West Bank when he was held for 90 minutes, he says.

title_en: Palestinians mourn Gaza World Cup screenings organiser killed in Israeli strike
excerpt_en: Aid worker Mohammed al-Wahidi had become a prominent humanitarian figure during the Israel-Hamas war.

title_en: Lawyer says detained Gaza doctor was severely beaten in Israeli jail
excerpt_en: The lawyer for Dr Hussam Abu Safiya tells the BBC his client was so badly beaten he could not recognise him during a visit last week.

title_en: Israeli police officer filmed throwing stun grenade into car in West Bank
excerpt_en: Israel's police force says the officer acted "not in accordance with procedure" and that it has opened an investigation.
